activation_mode.mechanism: Codex AGENTS.md files load unconditionally; no conditional or model-decision activation documented

auto_memory.mechanism: Codex does not have an AI-generated auto-memory system

cross_provider_recognition.mechanism: agents_md_filename: Codex reads AGENTS.md files using the standard filename used by multiple providers

file_imports.mechanism: No file import syntax documented for Codex AGENTS.md files

hierarchical_loading.mechanism: hierarchical_agents_md: Codex loads AGENTS.md from subdirectories with defined precedence (deeper overrides higher)

providerExtensions.name: AGENTS.md Filename
providerExtensions.summary: Native rules filename is AGENTS.md, with configurable fallback list via config.toml project_doc_fallback_filenames.

providerExtensions.name: Hierarchical AGENTS.md (child_agents_md feature flag)
providerExtensions.summary: When features.child_agents_md is enabled, Codex emits scope/precedence guidance and combines AGENTS.md files across a directory hierarchy.

providerExtensions.name: Project Doc Max Bytes
providerExtensions.summary: Configurable byte cap on AGENTS.md reads via config.toml project_doc_max_bytes; prevents oversized rules files from blowing the context window.
